title: KAN Energy Tier Implementation
description: Created KAN (Kolmogorov-Arnold Networks) energy function implementation as a new tier in the Carnot EBM framework. KAN addresses the constraint learning ceiling where linear Ising features cannot capture nonlinear constraint relationships.
context: Exp 103 (KAN energy tier) failed due to rate limits. This is a re-attempt with the KAN implementation completed.

python.description: Python KAN implementation with BSpline, KANEnergyFunction, KANModel

rust.description: Rust KAN scaffold with TODO comments for full implementation

tests.description: 26 tests covering BSpline, KAN config, energy function, gradient, from_ising, parameter scaling

kan_energy_function.energy_formula: E(x) = sum_ij f_ij(x_i * x_j) + sum_i g_i(x_i)
kan_energy_function.from_ising: initializes KAN from Ising coupling matrix

next_steps: Full Rust KAN implementation with proper B-spline evaluation
E2E tests with target models (Qwen3.5-0.8B, google/gemma-4-E4B-it)
result_header: WARNING: Experiment 108 has no explicit live inference provenance. Keep this artifact for the research record, but treat its metrics as unverified rather than validated live performance.
